conflict: After the public break, Silas must choose between restored personal success and a diminished but honest future, while Inez refuses sentimental shortcuts.
consequence: Silas destroys the contract and forfeits proprietary fame; he and Inez agree to a conditional partnership built on shared work and no sole credit.
must_land_beats: Let Gideon's offer be genuinely tempting so refusal costs something real.
Make the contract's destruction materially and symbolically decisive.
Allow Damaris's publication of the supporting documents to widen the consequence beyond private catharsis.
Have Inez set terms that are practical, erotic, and ethical all at once.
End on recommitment without pretending repair is complete.
pressure_source: After the public break, Silas must choose between restored personal success and a diminished but honest future, while Inez refuses sentimental shortcuts.
state_shift: Silas destroys the contract and forfeits proprietary fame; he and Inez agree to a conditional partnership built on shared work and no sole credit.
